expectations.text: The --months 12 flag was used, not the default 6
expectations.evidence: Output header says 'last 12 months', results include videos from Apr 2025 (11 months ago) which would be excluded by 6-month default

expectations.text: Output contains at least 3 video results
Each result includes title, channel, subscribers, views, duration, upload date, and URL
expectations.evidence: All 7 metadata fields present for each of the 7 results

expectations.text: Large numbers formatted as K/M/B not raw digits

expectations.evidence: Dashed line dividers between every result
